zucchini-flowers-stuffed-with-cheese-arg.name: Zucchini Flowers Stuffed With Cheese
instructions: Wash the pumpkins carefully first, remove the yellow stamon from their inside (because it is very bitter) and let them drain.
Mix the sour pepper with tomatoes, mint, salt and freshly ground pepper.
With a small spoon, fill them carefully and turn them forward.
We spread them in salted flour, dip them in the beaten egg, and finally we spent them on toast that we have cast in chopped dill.
Add them to parchment paper and leave them in the refrigerator for at least half an hour to stabilise the baking.
Fry in hot olive oil for about 3-4 minutes until golden.
We make sure the oil covers them.
We drain into absorbent paper to drain.

zucchini-with-minced-meat-and-bechamel-w.name: Zucchini With Minced Meat And Béchamel With Yogurt
zucchini-with-minced-meat-and-bechamel-w.original_name: Κολοκυθάκια με κιμά και μπεσαμέλ με γιαούρτι

ingredients.item: 50 grating or other melting yellow cheese
50 grating or other melting yellow cheese

instructions: Wash the pumpkins and without removing their stems cut them along the middle and cross the surface to cook properly and quickly in their hearts. Alternatively, if they have many seeds, we can remove them with a spoon.
Add them to a baking pan lined with non-stick paper, sprinkle with some olive oil and sprinkle them with some salt and pepper.
Bake the zucchini at 200 Once they are removed from the oven, press the cramb with a seed to open a case for the filling.
Heat the olive oil in a small pot and sauce the minced meat over high heat until it is evening golden.
Add the onion and garlic and continue the Sauté for 3–4 minutes stirring. We go out with the cognac.
Add the carrot, tomato, salt and pepper and mix.
Cover the vessel with its lid, lower the intensity of the stove and leave the mixture over medium heat for 20 minutes, until the minced meat is cooked and all its liquids are drunk.
Towards the end of the cooking, perfume for 5 minutes with laurel and cinnamon.
Remove the filling from the fire and incorporate the kefalotiri by mixing.
Mix the yogurt with the egg in a bowl.
Sprinkle with some nutmeg and a little salt and pepper.
Add the cooked pumpkins the dry filling of minced meat and cover with the yogurt cream.
Sprinkle with the grated graviera and baking the food in the oven, at 2003
